question: In the Gospel of John, what does Jesus call himself that includes the words “way,” “truth,” and “life”?

choices.A: The way, the truth, and the life
choices.B: The prophet, the priest, and the king
choices.C: The law, the temple, and the sacrifice
choices.D: The messenger, the angel, and the servant

teaching.title: Jesus’ self-description
teaching.body: John records Jesus saying, “I am the way, and the truth, and the life.”
